proposal.summary: Implement a focused puzzle runtime system that opens PuzzleUI from puzzle interactables and validates PuzzleDefinition answers.
out_of_scope: Monster danger consequences from failed puzzle attempts

user_decisions.decision: Proceed through Harness steps automatically and treat the recurring next-step prompt as approval to continue approved-for-implementation units.

decision_log.reason: phases/index.json has no active or blocked phase and NEXT_ACTION.md recommends PuzzleRuntimeSystem.

current_state: Completed. Puzzle-backed interactables open PuzzleUI through PuzzleSystem, shared answer input validates PuzzleDefinition answers, and Stage1 scene references are wired.
resume_instructions: This phase is complete. Next, start one new Harness unit for EventRuntimeSystem only if phases/index.json has no in_progress or blocked phase.
next_action: Start EventRuntimeSystem to execute logged puzzle, item, room, and escape EventDefinition effects.
